zh.lifeSummary: 當Maude de Grey於大約1272年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，她的父親Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton33歲，母親Maude FitzHugh52歲。她於大約1288年與John de Moels 1st Baron Moels在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1337年8月21日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特卡素 加里享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maude de Grey于大约1272年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，她的父亲Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton33岁，母亲Maude FitzHugh52岁。她于大约1288年与John de Moels 1st Baron Moels在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1337年8月21日在英国英格兰薩默塞特卡素 加里享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Maude de Grey was born about 1272, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton, was 33 and her mother, Maude FitzHugh, was 52. She married John de Moels 1st Baron Moels about 1288, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 21 August 1337, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maude de Grey est née environ 1272, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Maude FitzHugh, avait 52 ans. Elle a épousé John de Moels 1st Baron Moels environ 1288, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 21 août 1337, à Castle Cary, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maude de Grey um 1272 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton 33 und ihre Mutter Maude FitzHugh 52. Sie hat um 1288 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom John de Moels 1st Baron Moels geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 21. August 1337 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato John de Moels 1st Baron Moels circa 1288, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 21 agosto 1337, nel Castle Cary, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maude de Greyが約1272年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wiltonは33歳，母Maude FitzHughは52歳であった。約1288年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでJohn de Moels 1st Baron Moelsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1337年8月21日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maude de Grey(이)가 대략 1272년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude FitzHugh(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 대략 1288년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 John de Moels 1st Baron Moels(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1337년 8월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maude de Grey nasceu aproximadamente 1272, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Maude FitzHugh, tinha 52 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Moels 1st Baron Moels aproximadamente 1288, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maude de Grey родилась около 1272 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Maude FitzHugh, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Moels 1st Baron Moels около 1288 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 21 августа 1337 г. в местности кастл кэри, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.
